prompt: search for junior software developer jobs in Israel across all the Israeli job boards. yoad just graduated and has no preference on tech stack

assertions.text: WebSearch is used to query at least 2 different Israeli job board sites (e.g., alljobs.co.il, drushim.co.il, il.indeed.com, janglo.net)
At least one search query contains Hebrew characters (e.g., מפתח תוכנה, מתכנת)
Results include source attribution indicating which site each job came from
Output includes at least 3 distinct job listings with titles
